summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of gym management platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with authentication, member management, payment processing, and dashboard metrics all working correctly.
passed_tests: User registration and login with JWT authentication
Member CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Payment registration with automatic expiration calculation
Multiple plan types (mensual 30 days, trimestral 90 days, semestral 180 days, anual 365 days)
Automatic status updates (activo/vencido) based on payment expiration
Dashboard metrics calculation (total socios, activos, vencidos, ingresos del mes)
Search and filter functionality for members
Navigation between Dashboard, Socios, and Pagos pages
Modal forms for creating/editing members and registering payments
Responsive design with proper spacing and colors
